description: Input schema for GPT Image 2 generation.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired image.
examples: A cat wearing a tiny top hat, oil painting style
prompt.title: Prompt

images.description: Optional reference image(s) for editing. When a mask is provided, it applies to the first image.
images.title: Images

mask.description: Optional mask image indicating areas to edit (requires input images). Transparent areas in the mask indicate where the image should be edited. Applied to the first image.
mask.title: Mask

width.description: Output image width in pixels. Must be a multiple of 16.
width.title: Width

height.description: Output image height in pixels. Must be a multiple of 16.
height.title: Height

quality.description: Rendering quality. 'low' for fast drafts, 'high' for final assets.
quality.title: Quality

output_compression.description: Compression level for jpeg/webp (0-100). Ignored for png.
output_compression.title: Output Compression

title: AppInput
